description: Standard vendor-dir convention `third_party/` (common in Google-style and Bazel-class repos) containing an example library with a literal JWT. Post-v0.15.4, `third_party` in DEFAULT_IGNORE (literal-pattern handled as exact-match by picomatch) must cause walkFiles to skip this directory. Verifies that literal-string patterns continue to work under the new picomatch-matching logic — no regression on exact-string semantic. jwt-detector must NOT emit.
